name: Wayfair Inc.
summary: PART I As used herein, Wayfair, the company, we, us, our and similar terms refer to Wayfair Inc. and its subsidiaries, unless the context indicates otherwise. Overview Wayfair is the destination for all things home. Through our e-commerce platform, we offer customers visually inspired browsing, compelling merchandising, easy product discovery and attractive prices. We are focused on bringing our customers an experience that is at the forefront of shopping for the home online. Our customers span ...
